locations_inspected.name: Keystone Commercial Builders, Inc.
findings: Wet Pipe sprinkler system, 28 years old, manufactured by Viking, NFPA 13 Compliant
3 control valves inspected — all found in open position
Sprinkler heads visual condition: Fair — minor corrosion observed
Spare heads in cabinet: Yes — adequate supply
deficiencies: [Advisory] Electrical panel clearance obstructed by stored materials
[Priority] Exposed wiring and missing junction box covers in main electrical room

recommendations.description: Clear stored materials obstructing electrical panel clearance
Remediate exposed wiring and install missing junction box covers in main electrical room
Resolve supervisory signal deficiency noted in alarm devices

overall_assessment.summary: Fire protection system inspection resulted in an overall PASS. The wet pipe system (28 years, Viking) is NFPA 13 compliant with adequate water supply. Minor corrosion observed on sprinkler heads and a supervisory signal deficiency was noted. Two electrical deficiencies were identified — one advisory and one priority — requiring corrective action.
